summary: Task 031 is complete in substance. The repository now defines one mixed public publishing boundary for notes and links, persists link publish state, keeps public access constrained to explicitly published content, and the provided `npm run verify` pass matches the implementation and coverage I inspected.
satisfied_exit_criteria: The repo has a clear notes-plus-links public publishing model in both docs and code, centered on the shared `public-content` boundary and mixed published-content query path.

Links can participate in public publishing without weakening private-by-default behavior: `Link.isPublished` defaults to false, `publishedAt` is explicit, owner-only publish/unpublish flows check ownership first, and public queries only read published records.

`npm run verify` was reported passing, and the inspected unit plus E2E coverage substantively exercises the mixed homepage surface, note/link publish-unpublish behavior, unpublished-content exclusion, and owner-route protection.
